prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20437名、2026 年大幅扩招约26.9%（拉低位次数字增大）、软科排名持续提升至第63名（提升吸引力，位次数字减小）、医学大类热度偏热（吸引竞争，位次数字减小）、声誉偏负面（抑制部 分报考，位次数字增大）、本省考生规模略有增加（竞争加剧，位次数字增大）等多重因素，扩招效应与排名提升、医学热度相互对冲，预计2026年最低位次约23538名，区间230 38–24038名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 31107 → 8712 → 37403 → 21236 → 20437, with drastic fluctuations: a significant forward shift to 8712 in 2022, a major backward shift to 37403 in 2023, a recovery to 21236 in 2024, and a slight further rise to 20437 in 2025 (Nursing category batch). In recent two years, there is a gradual forward trend, with a baseline of about 20437 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category: 43 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 52 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 66, an increase of about 26.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically would lower the ranking (increase the ranking number), but the improvement in university tier and the relatively hot medical field will partially offset the expansion effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, a significant improvement, reflecting steadily enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in Hebei, Henan and other provinces in 2025, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in Northeast China; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, with average evaluation, and short video exposure is relatively low; the abnormal admission file shows a decline in the university's 2025 admission ranking, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; however, the university, with Chinese Medicine and Chinese Materia Medica as its core specialties, is the only 211 university among national Chinese medicine institutions, with prominent disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity evaluation for the medical category (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.) is recommended/relatively hot; Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica and other related majors benefit from the overall rise in medical popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou general college entrance examination is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,258 in 2025, with an estimated 208,400 Physics Category candidates, leading to slightly intensified competition; Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guizhou candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5% (2025), making it a small-scale enrollment institution from other provinces, with limited impact of regional preference on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 20437, a significant expansion of about 26.9% in 2026 (lowering ranking, increasing number), continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking to 63rd (increasing attractiveness, decreasing ranking number), relatively hot medical category (attracting competition, decreasing ranking number), slightly negative reputation (inhibiting some applications, increasing ranking number), and a slight increase in the number of local candidates (intensifying competition, increasing ranking number), the expansion effect and the improvement in ranking and medical popularity offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 23538, with a range of 23038–24038.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1670 → 1233 → 796 → 3822 → 3012. From 2021 to 2023, it moved forward year by year (from 1670 to 796). In 2024, due to the reform of the college entrance examination model (from Liberal Arts to History Category), it significantly dropped to 3822. In 2025, it rebounded to 3012, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend in the past two years, with a baseline of approximately 3012 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for History Category: 5 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 4 in 2025. The planned number is small and fluctuates. In 2026, the plan is 5 students, an increase of 25% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically lowering the ranking (increasing the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, a significant improvement, reflecting the steady enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in 2025. The Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, with an average evaluation. The abnormal admission file shows that the university's admission ranking declined in 2025, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. However, the university, with Traditional Chinese Medicine and Chinese Materia Medica as its core specialties, is the only 211 university among national Chinese medicine institutions, with prominent disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity evaluation for the medical major category is recommended/relatively hot, with Traditional Chinese Medicine-related majors benefiting from the overall rise in medical popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 90,600 candidates in the History Category, a slight increase compared to 2025 (approximately 90,087), leading to slightly intensified competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%, making it a small-scale enrollment institution from other provinces, with limited impact of regional preference on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3012, a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 (lowering the ranking, increasing the number), the continuous improvement of Soft Science ranking to 63rd (enhancing appeal, decreasing the ranking number), the relatively hot medical major category (attracting competition, decreasing the ranking number), the somewhat negative reputation (inhibiting some applications, increasing the ranking number), and a slight increase in the number of local candidates (intensifying competition, increasing the ranking number), the expansion effect, ranking improvement, and medical popularity offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 3414, with a range of 2914–3914.
